oauth_clients_owner_all.name: oauth_clients_owner_all
oauth_clients_owner_all.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id" = "oauth_clients"."owner_id"
      and "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )
oauth_clients_owner_all.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id" = "oauth_clients"."owner_id"
      and "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )

oauth_codes_owner_via_user.name: oauth_codes_owner_via_user
oauth_codes_owner_via_user.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id" = "oauth_codes"."user_id"
      and "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )
oauth_codes_owner_via_user.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id" = "oauth_codes"."user_id"
      and "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )

project_settings_owner_via_project.name: project_settings_owner_via_project
project_settings_owner_via_project.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "projects"
    where "projects"."id" = "project_settings"."project_id"
      and "projects"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )
project_settings_owner_via_project.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "projects"
    where "projects"."id" = "project_settings"."project_id"
      and "projects"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )

security_events_owner_select.name: security_events_owner_select
security_events_owner_select.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
      and "users"."is_owner" = true
  )

security_events_owner_insert.name: security_events_owner_insert
security_events_owner_insert.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "users"
    where "users"."id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
      and "users"."is_owner" = true
  )
        and ("security_events"."owner_id" is null or "security_events"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), ''))

task_label_assignments_owner_via_task.name: task_label_assignments_owner_via_task
task_label_assignments_owner_via_task.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "tasks"
    where "tasks"."id" = "task_label_assignments"."task_id"
      and "tasks"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )
    and exists (
      select 1
      from "task_labels"
      where "task_labels"."id" = "task_label_assignments"."label_id"
        and "task_labels"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
    )
task_label_assignments_owner_via_task.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "tasks"
    where "tasks"."id" = "task_label_assignments"."task_id"
      and "tasks"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
  )
    and exists (
      select 1
      from "task_labels"
      where "task_labels"."id" = "task_label_assignments"."label_id"
        and "task_labels"."owner_id"::text = nullif(current_setting('app.user_id', true), '')
    )

users_insert_owner_bootstrap.name: users_insert_owner_bootstrap
users_insert_owner_bootstrap.withCheck:
"users"."is_owner" = true
        and not exists (select 1 from "users" where "users"."is_owner" = true)
